'''Laramus''' was the location of [[Laramus Base]], headquarters of the [[Laramus Base Irregulars]], as well as a rapidly-growing [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] cell. The ''[[Visseon II]]'' led a Rebel ambush of an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] convoy over Laramus. The Empire later destroyed much of the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface, forcing the Irregulars to leave.
